title: Draft 'what single-cell research is learning about Ewing' explainer
context: M5 CONDITIONAL education layer — does NOT start without an advocacy partner AND credentialed oncologist + patient-advocate reviewers. Patient-facing oncology content is high risk: every statement must be sourced, plain-language, and prominently labeled 'not medical advice', with NO prognosis, treatment, or patient-specific guidance. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Draft a sourced, plain-language explainer of what single-cell research is learning about Ewing sarcoma, prominently labeled 'not medical advice'.
acceptanceCriteria: Every statement sourced; plain language; prominently labeled 'not medical advice'.
No prognosis, treatment, or patient-specific guidance.
Drafting does not begin until an advocacy partner and oncologist + patient-advocate reviewers are secured (milestone gate).
